title: Fix SubscriptionProvider missing from guest flow causing crash

requirements.summary: Ensure SubscriptionProvider wraps the entire application component tree so that every route (including guest flow) has access to subscription context, eliminating 'useSubscriptionContext must be used within SubscriptionProvider' runtime errors
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Continue as Guest' on the LoginPage no longer throws 'useSubscriptionContext must be used within SubscriptionProvider'.
All routes (Dashboard, FocusMode, ProgressTracking, ExamSetup, Settings) render without subscription context errors for both guest and authenticated users.
SubscriptionProvider is placed in App.tsx or equivalent root-level file, wrapping all route definitions.
Authenticated user flow continues to work correctly with no regression in subscription state.

file_operations.description: Wrap the entire RouterProvider component tree with SubscriptionProvider to ensure all routes (protected and public) have access to the subscription context. Import SubscriptionProvider from contexts/SubscriptionContext.tsx and place it at the highest level, above the RouterProvider, so that both authenticated and guest flows can access useSubscriptionContext without errors.
